originalTitle: It’s the last day of Prime Day — here are over 140 great deals to choose from
summary: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular […]
content: We’ve arrived at the final day of Prime Day, which at this point should probably be called “Prime Week.” We’ve found discounts on all manner of gadgets, including TVs, smart home tech, chargers, headphones, and more. Some of the best deals have started selling out at some retailers, so if you’ve been craving a popular upgrade like the AirPods Max 2, time is running low. The good news is that our team is still hard at work, and in addition to the deals that remain in stock, the retailers sometimes save up a few extras for the last day (like this Echo Spot that got a little cheaper). This roundup is our pride and joy; the culmination of over four days of deal hunting by our entire team. We’ve worked tirelessly for the last week and arrived at a list of over 120 discounted items (and growing) that we’re happy to share with you. Of course, our Prime Day coverage spans every category The Verge staff touches, and is a great place to explore the full breadth of discounts we’re able to find on the stuff we’ve tested, regularly use, and love. We genuinely enjoy helping you save on cool tech and fun gadgets that are actually worth your hard-earned money, especially when everything is getting more expensive. Featured Products Birdbuddy Pro (solar) Hoto 3.6V Electric Screwdriver Kit Pro Amazon Echo Spot Kindle (11th-gen) Sony WH-1000XM6 iPad (2025) Belkin BoostCharge Pro 3-in-1 Wireless Charging Stand with Qi2 15W Oura Ring 4 Nex Playground Lego Botanicals Flower Bouquet Building Set In this article Smart home deals [Product: Echo Show 8 (2025) | https://www.amazon.com/Amazon-Echo-Show-8-Vibrant-HD-8.7-display-Graphite-Amazon/dp/B0DC8ZMR1P/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazon-echo-show-8-newest-model-vibrant-hd-8-7-display-with-spatial-audio-designed-for-alexa-graphite%2FJ39TLSRKP2, https://goto.target.com/c/482924/81938/2092?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.target.com%2Fp%2Famazon-echo-show-8-2025%2F-%2FA-95002749] * Amazon’s Echo Show 11 is on sale for $149.99 ($80 off) at Amazon, which marks its best price to date. It’s almost identical to the Echo Show 8, except that it offers a larger and sharper 1080p resolution. * You can buy the latest Echo Show 5 for $49.99 ($40 off) at Amazon, which is one of its better prices in recent months though $20 shy of its all-time low. The smart display also works with Alexa Plus, but it’s smaller than the Echo Show 8 with less robust sound, and better suited for small table tops or office desks. [Product: Philips Hue smart bulb starter kit | https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Hue-Starter-Compatible-Assistant/dp/B096YFWVVS/?tag=theverge02-20] * The Philips Hue Go Smart Portable Table Lamp is on sale for $123.47 ($53 off) at Amazon, which is a new low. The water resistant lamp can display millions of colors and lasts 48 hours on a single charge. It also offers customizable lighting effects and support for Matter, so you can control it via any major smart home platform. * If you like the idea of the Philips Hue portable smart lamp but want something cheaper, Govee’s Table Lamp Classic is down to a new low of $55.99 ($25 off) at Amazon. The rechargeable lamp isn’t weather-resistant, but it offers up to 30 hours of battery life, adjustable color temperatures, and dozens of preset scenes and colorful lighting effects. [Product: Philips Hue Twilight sleep-wake lamp | https://www.amazon.com/Philips-Hue-Bluetooth-Compatible-Assistant/dp/B0DBXHCZFG?tag=theverge02-20, https://go.skimresources.com/?id=1025X1701640&xs=1&url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.philips-hue.com%2Fen-us%2Fp%2Fsleep-and-wake-up-light-twilight-sleep-and-wake-up-light-black%2F046677585631%3Forigin%3D_cmp%3D20961164112_kwd%3D%26gclsrc%3Daw.ds%26gad_source%3D1%26gad_campaignid%3D20967583196%26gbraid%3D0AAAAAqwUBEQcnFUTeIcjO4TDNO6aIyhRu%26gclid%3DCj0KCQjw_rPGBhCbARIsABjq9cewKhIjvdj0Yuk2L3FQU3p5wulNDSM8QvGpKyMBhUxuBcEq1KgSIwYaAsVWEALw_wcB] [Product: Amazon Echo Spot | https://www.amazon.com/All-new-Amazon-Echo-Spot-2024-release-Smart-alarm-clock-with-vibrant-sound-Alexa-Black/dp/B0BFC7WQ6R?tag=theverge02-20] [Product: Govee Uplighter Floor Lamp | https://www.amazon.com/Govee-Uplighter-Projector-Bedroom-Standing/dp/B0F3NZ12GL?tag=theverge02-20, https://goto.walmart.com/c/482924/565706/9383?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.walmart.com%2Fip%2FGovee-Uplighter-Floor-Lamp%2F17115018059%2F, https://govee.sjv.io/c/482924/3014037/12845?u=https%3A%2F%2Fus.govee.com%2Fproducts%2Fgovee-uplighter-floor-lamp] * The foundation of a good smart home is Wi-Fi, so if you’re still rocking a router with Wi-Fi 6 or even 5, Prime Day is a good time to upgrade. All of Amazon’s eero mesh Wifi routers are on sale, and its flagship eero Wifi 7 Pro is down to $549.99 from $699.99. If you don’t need that much power, the equally capable eero Wifi 6E is down to $329.99 for a three-pack. [Product: Ring Battery Doorbell Plus (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/Ring-Battery-Doorbell-newest-Nickel/dp/B0GGLS1C4W?ref=amzdv_tplus_dp_dsk_bdldp_B0F14N7HHH_B0GGLS1C4W&tag=theverge02-20] [Product: Google Nest Wifi Pro | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0BCQSYPZB?tag=theverge02-20] * The rubbed-bronze version of the versatile Yale Assure Lock 2 with WiFi is $70 off on Prime Day, discounted to $189.98. This lock features a real keypad, not a touchscreen, along with support for all the major smart home platforms, including Apple Home (although it doesn’t work with Home Key). [Product: Blink Video Doorbell (second-gen) | https://www.amazon.com/dp/B0DGQZ8JZK?tag=theverge02-20] * The Eufy Security SoloCam S220 is on sale for $54.14 (usually $99.99) at Amazon, and features built-in solar power, 8GB of internal storage so you don’t need a subscription, and infrared LEDs for sharper night vision. [Product: Skylight Calendar 2 | https://www.amazon.com/Skylight-Calendar-Touchscreen-Wirecutter-Interactive/dp/B0G615HBG7/?tag=theverge02-20, https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fprod
chineseTitle: 今天是 Prime Day 的最后一天——这里有 140 多项超值优惠可供选择
chineseSummary: 我们已经到了 Prime Day 的最后一天，此时可能应该被称为“Prime Week”。我们发现各种小工具都有折扣，包括电视、智能家居技术、充电器、耳机等。一些最优惠的商品已经开始在一些零售商处售罄，因此，如果您一直渴望流行的[...]
chineseContent: 我们已经到了 Prime Day 的最后一天，此时可能应该被称为“Prime Week”。我们发现各种小工具都有折扣，包括电视、智能家居技术、充电器、耳机等。一些最优惠的产品已经开始在一些零售商处售空，因此，如果您一直渴望获得像 AirPods Max 2 这样的热门升级产品，那么时间已经不多了。好消息是，我们的团队仍在努力工作，除了库存中的交易外，零售商有时还会在最后一天节省一些额外的费用（比如这个 Echo Spot 稍微便宜一点）。这次综述是我们的骄傲和喜悦；这是我们整个团队四天多的交易搜寻的高潮。上周我们不知疲倦地工作，得出了 120 多种折扣商品（并且还在不断增加）的清单，我们很高兴与您分享。当然，我们的 Prime Day 覆盖范围涵盖了 The Verge 员工涉及的每个类别，并且是探索我们能够在我们测试过、经常使用和喜爱的产品上找到的全面折扣的好地方。我们真诚地乐意帮助您节省购买炫酷技术和有趣的小玩意的费用，这些产品实际上物有所值，尤其是当所有东西都变得越来越贵的时候。特色产品 Birdbuddy Pro（太阳能） Hoto 3.6V 电动螺丝刀套件 Pro 亚马逊 Echo Spot Kindle（第 11 代）索尼 WH-1000XM6 iPad（2025） Belkin BoostCharge Pro 三合一无线充电座，带 Qi2 15W Oura Ring 4 Nex Playground 乐高植物花束拼搭套装 本文中智能家居优惠 [产品：Echo Show 8 (2025) | https://www.amazon.com/Amazon-Echo-Show-8-Vibrant-HD-8.7-display-Graphite-Amazon/dp/B0DC8ZMR1P/?tag=theverge02-20， https://bestbuy.7tiv.net/c/482924/614286/10014?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.bestbuy.com%2Fproduct%2Famazon-echo-show-8-newest-model-v
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
